news.paragraph: Exchange-traded funds and equity futures have recently trended lower alongside broader US equity declines. Options traders should be mindful of the upcoming Consumer Inflation Report, which serves as a significant imminent catalyst for market volatility. The current news context reflects a cautious environment driven by macroeconomic data expectations.
